sprint: Clicking an Empty Artwork Place Now Selects It Instead of Deselecting Everything
task: A real, user-reported bug flagged earlier this session and now fixed: 'in creator clicks between place 1 and 2 are not being managed properly.' Root cause: js/app.js's canvas mousedown handler only called _setSelectedSceneElement inside the same guard that also starts the image-pan gesture -- so selecting a Place was accidentally coupled to that Place already having a picture. Clicking an empty Place's placeholder box fell through to the 'clicked empty space' branch, which actively deselected everything instead of selecting the empty Place -- pre-existing legacy behaviour for Place 1 too, just far more noticeable with several empty boxes side by side. Fixed by splitting 'select the Place' from 'start a pan gesture': selection now fires for ANY real Place hit-test result regardless of whether it has a picture yet; the pan gesture itself still only starts once that Place actually has an image to pan. Verified via a new Playwright test against a real Dual Holder Scene with no pictures uploaded: clicking either empty Place's placeholder now correctly selects it and Context Panel shows Add Artwork; clicking genuine empty canvas background still correctly deselects. Full regression across the entire existing Creator/Builder/Card-Platform Playwright suite (26 scripts) and both goldenBuild.js suites passes unchanged, zero console errors. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
